title: Go upload-url local implementation candidate

status_semantics.summary: 23.8-thumb.7 proves only a local/copied-data upload-url thumbnail candidate. It does not promote Go to live upload/upload-url/import owner and does not remove Pillow from the packaged/runtime dependency set.

implementation.db_behavior: sqlite_query_only remains true because upload-url candidate writes files only
implementation.production_guard: production-like knowledge.db still requires PRISM_GO_ALLOW_PROD_DB=1; upload-url writes additionally require PRISM_GO_ALLOW_PROD_UPLOADS=1
implementation.dependency_policy: reuse existing github.com/skrashevich/go-webp v0.1.0; no new Go dependency added

safety_guards: literal IP validation before DNS resolver injection
DNS resolution rejects unresolvable, private, loopback, link-local, multicast, unspecified, shared/reserved, and documentation ranges
redirect target validation before following redirects
deterministic browser-like User-Agent and origin Referer headers
download is capped with MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH + 1 streaming read before any file write
URL basename is sanitized; no-extension URLs use deterministic remote_<md5(url)[:8]> fallback plus Content-Type extension
thumbnail_only thumbnail failure keeps original image and returns filename null

retained_python_owner.live_routing_status: not routed by frontend, Caddy, Pi systemd, or default runtime

linux_arm64_cgo0_build.command: cd go-shadow; GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o ../build/phase23-thumb7/prism-go-runtime-thumb7-linux-arm64 .

unit_coverage: flag disabled route returns 405 and writes no files
empty URL, bad scheme, literal loopback, DNS private, and unresolvable targets return 400
redirect to private host is rejected
non-image Content-Type, oversize, and magic mismatch return 400 and write no files
standard remote PNG writes original and _thumb.webp
thumbnail_only thumbnail failure keeps original and returns filename null
sanitized URL basename and deterministic hash fallback filename

not_authorized_by_23_8_thumb_7: Change upload delete or orphan cleanup ownership
Route frontend or Caddy upload traffic to Go
Write production DB or production uploads

allowed_next_step.title: Pillow dependency removal closure
allowed_next_step.summary: Single closure item to finish what is still missing before deleting Pillow: live thumbnail owner/import-helper/delete-cleanup decision, implementation if needed, verification, then Pillow dependency deletion. Do not create 23.8-thumb.8/9/10.
